body.notes: Replace _log.warning() with log_error() from forensic_logger. Add: from ..cognition.forensic_logger import log_error. Two call sites in schema_runner.py. Close #333.
body.title: schema_runner.py: add forensic logging
body.result: schema_runner.py forensic logging: replaced all 4 _log.warning() calls with log_error() from forensic_logger. Removed logging import. Four sites: SCHEMA_CATALOG_LOAD (2×, load_primitives_catalog + load_missing_primitives), SCHEMA_PRIM_FAIL (primitive execution error), SCHEMA_UNKNOWN_PRIM (unknown primitive name). All routed to errors.log with kind/detail/source. Syntax OK, all run_habit tests pass.
